Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $110 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (2% odds) on crude reach $110. Closes in 3d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $200 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (2% odds) on crude reach $200. Closes in ~1mo. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $85 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Lower-probability outcome (19%) that crude drop below $85. Closes in 3d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $80 in May?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (4% odds) on crude drop below $80. Closes in 3d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $70 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Lower-probability outcome (16%) that crude drop below $70. Closes in ~1mo. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $80 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Near coin-flip odds (48% YES) crude drop below $80. Closes in ~1mo. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Other.why_it_matters: Reflects conditions that can affect agricultural commodity prices, input costs, or farm policy.

Trade & Policy.title: Will Trump agree to Iranian oil sanction relief by May 31?

Trade & Policy.title: Russia x Ukraine ceasefire agreement by October 31, 2026?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Market prices 68% odds the conflict continues through 2026. Black Sea grain corridors remain a wild card for global wheat and corn supply; Ukraine has historically accounted for roughly 10% of world wheat exports when corridors are open.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 25 bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 98% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.
